value_chain_position: Enterprise workflow automation and AI-agent platform — occupies the simulation/workflow-software layer, selling IT service management and cross-enterprise process automation that is increasingly AI-agent orchestrated.
relative_comps: NOW is a stronger robotics_automation fit than CRM because its workflow-engine is the literal orchestration layer for enterprise AI agents — every automated process runs through the Now Platform. 22% 3-year CAGR and 22% YoY sustain the steep-ramp stage. FCF margin (33%) and near-zero net debt give it a financial profile comparable to the best SaaS franchises. Vs. Microsoft, NOW's cross-vendor agnosticism is a durable differentiator; vs. CRM, NOW is deeper in IT/ops automation rather than customer-facing workflows. Load-bearing score 4 reflects high switching costs and data gravity.
